SELECT date_array FROM test_dates WHERE length(date_array) = 0;
SELECT emptyArrayDate() AS empty_array_result, (SELECT emptyArrayDate()) AS nested_empty_array;
CREATE TABLE test_dates_2 (id UInt32, date_array Array(Date));
INSERT INTO test_dates_2 VALUES (1, emptyArrayDate()), (2, emptyArrayDate());
SELECT id, date_array FROM test_dates_2 WHERE emptyArrayDate() = date_array;
WITH emptyArrayDate() AS empty_array SELECT count() FROM test_dates_2 WHERE date_array = empty_array;
CREATE TABLE test_dates_3 (id UInt32, date_array Array(Date)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates_3 VALUES (1, emptyArrayDate()), (2, emptyArrayDate()), (3, emptyArrayDate());
SELECT id FROM test_dates_3 WHERE date_array = emptyArrayDate();
SELECT id, (SELECT count(*) FROM test_dates_3) AS total_records FROM test_dates_3 WHERE date_array = emptyArrayDate();
SELECT (SELECT emptyArrayDate() FROM test_dates_3 WHERE id = 1) AS single_empty_array;
